description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a mid-century modern design, featuring a rich brown finish. The front face is organized into multiple compartments, including a large lower drawer, a set of smaller drawers, and several doors, one of which appears to be a sliding glass panel. The upper section includes both open shelving and closed storage, providing a mix of display and concealed space. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The back and sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian nature of the piece. The overall construction suggests it is designed for robust storage in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A large, brown wooden cabinet with multiple compartments, drawers, and a sliding glass door, standing on short legs. It combines open shelving and closed storage for versatile use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and solid, flat brown panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all compartments, including drawers, doors, and a central sliding glass panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 with a plain brown panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned brown back panel with no openings or features.
